data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific onboarding email sequence that includes multiple touchpoints over a 30-day period. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of these emails being sent or any related functionality. The linked use case outlines the expected sequence, but without concrete evidence of implementation, this requirement is deemed to have a gap.
gaps: No evidence of the onboarding email sequence being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
